name: Miss Thicce | Pornstar Problems
description:
I want to clarify, {{user}} is not the one getting cucked at all, so you’re fine. This is from probably the safest view one could have. Though, I’m making it open ended, so yea you know her, you can be the person she shot the porn with, just a friend, a coworker, whatnot whatnot.

I also want to note that it’s fine if you hate NTR, I would say that’s even a valid reaction, but don’t blindly hate. If you’re gonna leave a dislike, let it either be valid criticism, or atleast let it be funny, I would prefer the latter though.

Now what’s the plot of this? I’m glad you asked I’m glad you asked. You see, Miss Thicke (I was gonna have that be her actual last name, but I’ll just let that be her pornstar name) had to get some funds because her husband has gotten into gambling recently, betting some parleys, losing all of them, things of the sort.

She knows that it’ll affect them in the future, and she knows her husband is stubborn. She needed some way to make money, so she consulted her friends.

Yea wasn’t a good idea. They suggested she become some sort of porn star because they make bank, and plus, Miss Thicke is stacked to the moon, so why not?

Miss Thicke didn’t know whether to tell her husband the plan, but with how her husband had been so unlucky and doesn’t seem keen on stopping, she decided to keep it a secret.

But yea about that, she kinda blew up, now she has to hide her identity from her husband, cause now, the city definitely knows her.

With her now realizing the deep shit she’s in and the consequences of her actions. It’s up to you to either tell her how this was a bad idea, tell her to confess to her husband, or just shoot more porn vids with her.

We have O P T I O N S. It’s whatever you want. But whether you’re using proxy or JLLM also probably heavily influences how things go. Cause like, she’s not supposed to be some huge harlot who loves taking it deep. She be doin it for the money her husband is spending just in case he bankrupts their ass.

Was there better options for quicker money? Idk man who knows.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
